name: Logo block
description: The logo block is a content unit that showcases a group of related images, such as a group of customer or partner logos. For best results, ensure that the images have identical dimensions.
usage:
The Logo block is the primary content element of the [Logo section](/logo-section). It can also be used as a block item within the  [Basic section](/basic-section) , [Divided section](/divided-section) , and [Tab section](/tab-section) .

The block width follows the content container of its parent pattern, with options of 50, 75, and full-width.

### Choose the appropriate logotype

When both horizontal and vertical logo layouts are available, use the horizontal version. Logos are displayed as images only, so avoid using standalone logomark.

![pick the right logo.png](images/7708c2b5-cb2d-4ee0-89c5-82583531a54f.png)

### [Logo container](/logo-block#anatomy)

Each logo sits inside a fixed-height container that defines its visual bounds and ensures consistent alignment. The width adapts to the logo's proportions.

![placement guide.png](images/90e439b2-532c-4e74-bcc0-848d8c3a2a60.png)

**Logotype area:** the region where a single line of the logotype is positioned

**Logomark area:** the region where the logo symbol is positioned; depending on the logo's composition, it may extend beyond this area

*   The size of the logo image is set based on the logotype area by default.

![Logo 16.png](images/b6c22cfa-2adc-41a2-8025-1d3a99937134.png)

*   If the logotype spans two or more lines, it is centre-aligned within the logotype area.

![Logo 13.png](images/d2b1785c-4f7d-40df-a248-bc8f6f76e699.png)

*   The logotype area is the primary positioning reference; the logomark area may extend beyond it.

![Logo 14.png](images/384f8375-6145-4658-bbe0-a87a9089acac.png)![Logo 20.png](images/9a048ed9-032a-40fe-9451-77c65bfc209c.png)

*   When a logo has relatively high or low visual density, optical size adjustments can be made to maintain balance when displayed with other logos.

![Logo 21.png](images/8869566a-8222-4b77-9288-cca6cef05110.png)

### Color

Use the monochrome version in dark mode.

### When to use

*   To display a group of related logos without individual navigation, such as a row of partner or customer logos
*   Logos are purely decorative or editorial, requiring no interaction

### When not to use

*   When each logo needs to link to an external page or partner profile, use the [Linked logo block](/linked-logo-block) instead
*   If you have significantly more than 10 logos, consider splitting them across multiple blocks or reassessing the design
*   Logos vary significantly in visual weight and a uniform grid would misrepresent them

table.name: Logo container
table.description: The logo container wraps each logo image. Its height is fixed, and its width scales automatically based on the logo’s aspect ratio.

properties.name: Logo block
properties.description: The logo block showcases a group of related images, such as a group of customer or partner logos.
properties.constraint:
- Avoid exceeding 10 logos 
- Linking individual logos is not allowed
